productDisplayName: Tabac Men Original Eau De Toilette Natural Spray
description: Launched by the design house of Maurer & Wirtz in 1959, TABAC ORIGINAL is a Men's fragrance that possesses a blend of lavender, citrus, and warm florals.It is recommended for casual wear.When applying any fragrance please consider that there are several factors which can affect the natural smell of your skin and, in turn, the way a scent smells on you. For instance, your mood, stress level, age, body chemistry, diet, and current medications may all alter the scents you wear. Similarly, factor such as dry or oily skin can even affect the amount of time a fragrance will last after being applied
